## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Testing

- [ ] `npm test`

## Checklist

- [ ] I did not include credentials, cookies, tokens, private target data, or unpublished third-party findings.
- [ ] I updated docs for user-facing behavior changes.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for behavior, prompt, installer, or security-boundary changes.
- [ ] I regenerated Claude-facing files when changing tool metadata or role bundles.
- [ ] I read `CONTRIBUTING.md`, `DISCLAIMER.md`, and `SECURITY.md`.
